.git
.gitignore
.gitattributes

# GitHub metadata (optional)
.github/**

# Dependencies
node_modules/**
vendor/**

.cache/**
.tmp/**

coverage/**

# Editor settings
.vscode/**
.idea/**

# OS-generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
desktop.ini

*.log
*.tmp
*.temp
*.swp
*~

.tmp.driveupload/**

.env
.env.*
!.env.example
